title: The Midnight Movie
setting: A cozy living room on a stormy night

scenes.text: Tim was enjoying his favorite movie, 'Adventures of Captain Silver', snuggled up with his cat Ginger. As the clock on the wall struck twelve, he noticed something strange.
scenes.image_description: Boy and cat watching TV, as lightning flickers outside

scenes.text: 'You're not supposed to talk back to us!' said Captain Silver from the screen. Tim gasped, but Ginger just blinked in surprise. 'Why did you do that?' asked Tim.
scenes.image_description: Movie characters speaking to boy onscreen

scenes.text: 'We're bored, Tim,' confessed the movie characters. 'You're the first person who's watched us in ages. Could we come out and play?' Tim smiled widely.
